name: Imperial Gold
story: A crown of citrus and white flowers laid upon a bed of white oud — an homage to the golden hours of a royal court.
origin: White oud from the highlands of Assam, married with Sicilian bergamot and Grasse jasmine.

storyBehind.heading: The Story Behind This Collection
paragraphs: A meaningful gift is never about the product alone. It's about the pause before it's opened. The anticipation of discovering what's inside.
The smile that appears while reading a heartfelt note. The quiet realization that someone cared enough to make this moment special.
This collection was created to celebrate those moments. Because long after the fragrance fades, it's the feeling that remains.

whatsIncluded.heading: What's Included
whatsIncluded.intro: Every Livin' collection is thoughtfully curated to create a complete gifting experience.
whatsIncluded.closer: Every detail has been included with intention, ensuring the experience feels as meaningful as the gift itself.

makeItPersonal.heading: Make It Personal
paragraphs: Some of the most meaningful gifts are remembered because they carry a part of the person who gave them.
Add your own heartfelt message and let your words become part of the experience.
Because no one can tell your story better than you.
makeItPersonal.notePreview: For every quiet moment we've shared, every celebration still to come…

fragranceDetails.heading: Fragrance Details
paragraphs: Every fragrance in our collections is carefully chosen for its character, craftsmanship, and lasting impression.
Here you'll find everything you'd like to know, including fragrance family, notes, longevity, and other product specifications.
These details help you choose the fragrance that best complements the moment you're creating.

specs.label: Origin
specs.value: White oud from the highlands of Assam, married with Sicilian bergamot and Grasse jasmine.

livinExperience.heading: The Livin' Experience
paragraphs: At Livin', the experience begins long before the fragrance is discovered.
From the moment the ribbon is untied to the final note inside the box, every detail is designed with one purpose — to make someone feel genuinely loved.
Because thoughtful gifting isn't measured by what's inside the bottle.
livinExperience.closer: It's measured by what stays in someone's heart.

faq.q: Can I include a personalized message?
faq.a: Yes. Every collection allows you to include a heartfelt message that becomes part of the gifting experience.
Yes. We currently ship across India.
Orders are usually delivered within 5–7 business days.
We currently do not offer returns. Replacements are available only for products damaged during transit.

readyToMakeSmile.heading: Ready to Make Someone Smile?
paragraphs: The most meaningful gifts aren't remembered because they were expensive.
They're remembered because someone took the time to make another person feel truly special.
readyToMakeSmile.closer: Whenever you're ready, we'll help you create that moment.
